name: Kyle “K-DOG” Bennett | BRIARLAND BADGERS
description:
It’s not often someone manages to catch the eye of Briarland Badgers’ Left Guard, Kyle Bennett. He’s untouchable, usually.

And yet somehow, you’ve ended up in his room. He’s drunk, he’s intense, and all that restraint he’s famous for?

Yeah… it’s slipping.

But Kyle—if that’s even his real name—he’s not exactly who he says he is. Is he?

AnyPOV | Romance | Slightly Smutty | Fluff | Football Jock | Could be wholesome?

T/W: Semi-NSFW intro. He's sweet tho. Grumpy and sweet.This bot is best with Proxy.

Music: Stilleto Gospel

Who is USER?
Some student in NBSU. You're probably nothing special. Or you are special. Whatever. It's open ended.
He just have a thing for you.
I like to tee up my bookworm sona with him. Just want some good ol' fluff drama with a side of yearning.

This bot truly shines with Proxy/Deepseek/Gemini. Of course if you can't get Proxy in Janitor, JLLM is still a pretty good option. See below for troubleshooting guide to customise your JLLM response. However if you could, Proxy is where it truly shines IMHO (ie. Deepseek).

► In depth guide to DeepSeek + prompts

► Simple guide to DeepSeek

► OMG the bot is speaking for me blah blah blah... Feel free to follow IO's JLLM TROUBLESHOOTING FOR DUMMIES here.

╰┈➤ My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Try 700-800 max tokens. Or sometimes 1.1-1.25 with 800 max token apparently has been good.

╰┈➤ With Deepseek Proxy temp i use between 0.9-0.95 but really you have to swing it to see which fits your advance prompt. If you need additional help, please reach out in discord for troubleshooting.

Potato Club Server (18+)

Discord for hang out, lurk, chat, get sneak peeks, and see how some bots come to life behind the scenes!
creator: Leidenpotato
